title_en: Roblox Plus Is Here: Everything You Need to Know!
title_ua: Roblox Plus вже тут: все, що треба знати!
summary_en: Roblox Plus launches April 30, 2026, replacing Roblox Premium at $4.99/month with perks including up to 20% item discounts, free private servers, free Robux transfers, and item trading access. Existing Premium members get a free 1-month trial.

title_en: AI Can Now Build Roblox Games FOR You — Here's How!
title_ua: ШІ тепер може будувати ігри в Roblox ЗАМІСТЬ тебе — ось як це працює!
summary_en: Overview of the 2026 vibe coding trend in Roblox Studio — AI plugins like Vibe Coder v0.5, Developer Intelligence, and Roblox's updated Assistant with 3D mesh generation let kids build games by describing what they want in plain English instead of writing code.

title_en: Roblox Studio Just Got 4D Building and It's Insane
title_ua: У Roblox Studio з'явилося 4D-будівництво — і це просто шалено круто!
summary_en: News article covering Roblox Studio's biggest 2026 updates including 4D creation with the Cube Foundation Model, AI Assistant with MCP server integration, Playtest Agent automation, redesigned Studio UI, and Emissive Masks for glowing effects.

title_en: Obby Mania 2026: Top Games, Pro Tips & How to Build Your Own
title_ua: Obby-манія 2026: найкращі ігри, про-поради та як створити свій власний
summary_en: Comprehensive 2026 obby guide covering the hottest games (Tower of Hell, Mega Fun Obby), pro gameplay tips like slowing down and skipping jumps on thin platforms, Tower of Hell secrets, and beginner advice for building your own obby in Roblox Studio.

title_en: Dad's Corner: I Tried to Fix My FPS and Broke Everything
title_ua: Татовий куточок: Хотів підняти FPS — зламав усе
summary_en: Dad's Corner humor article where FaionEnder hilariously tries to fix Roblox lag, accidentally resets all his settings, but shares genuinely useful FPS optimization tips including the native FPS unlocker, graphics slider tricks, and common performance fixes.

title_en: April 2026 Is HUGE — Friends Are Back and Roblox Plus Is Coming!
title_ua: Квітень 2026 — це БОМБА! "Друзі" повернулись, а Roblox Plus вже на підході!
summary_en: Comprehensive April 2026 Roblox news roundup covering the return of Friends/Games terminology, the new Roblox Plus subscription launching April 30, DOORS Rush Mode April Fools event, Brookhaven hitting 80 billion visits, and upcoming events like Gamescom Latam and RDC 2026.

title_en: Roblox Trading Tips 2026: Stay Safe and Score Big Deals!
title_ua: Поради з трейдингу в Roblox 2026: як не попастись на скам і вигідно обмінюватись!
summary_en: News article covering Roblox trading tips for April 2026, highlighting the UGC Limiteds boom, how to value items correctly using tools like Rolimons, and top scam prevention strategies including beam link phishing and AI-generated fake videos.

title_en: Murder Mystery 2 in 2026: Is It Still the GOAT?
title_ua: Murder Mystery 2 у 2026: Це досі найкраща гра?
summary_en: A 2026 review of Murder Mystery 2 covering its 25 billion visits milestone, Valentine's Update, the thriving knife trading economy, and why the 12-year-old classic still holds up against newer Roblox detective games.

title_en: Roblox Just Broke EVERY Record and It's Insane
title_ua: Roblox Побив ВСІ Рекорди і Це Просто Шалено
summary_en: Roundup of Roblox's biggest records in 2025-2026: Grow a Garden's 22.3M concurrent player Guinness World Record, Brookhaven RP hitting 80 billion visits, Steal a Brainrot's record-breaking virtual concert with 12.8M viewers, and Roblox platform milestones including 381.8M monthly active users.

title_en: Dad's Corner: I Tried Trading and Lost My Only Hat
title_ua: Татовий куточок: Я спробував трейдити і втратив свій єдиний капелюх
summary_en: FaionEnder's Dad's Corner article humorously recounts losing his only hat in a bad Roblox trade, then shares real safety tips about checking item values on Rolimons, avoiding projected items and bait-and-switch scams, and never trading outside the platform.
